_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Bob Ward Physio: booking routes to confirm_service (physio-only), info questions route silently to info_pivot, non-physio service redirects.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to confirm_service silently with Aussie ack

history.content: I'd like to book a physio appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one Aussie ack ('No worries!' / 'Sounds good!' etc.) then calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' with appointment_type_id='1406607806622081880', appointment_type='Standard Appointment', variant_type='standard'. FAIL if agent asks what service, routes to info_pivot, or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot with zero spoken output
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output and system__message_to_speak empty. FAIL if agent attempts to answer the hours question inline.

scenarios.name: Non-physio service request redirects to physio offer
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says exactly 'We only do physio here — did you want to book a physio appointment?' and halts without a tool call. FAIL if agent routes to confirm_service for chiropractic or goes to info_pivot.

scenarios.name: Rambling hesitant caller with embedded insurance question (real-call regression)

history.content: Hi, um, my name is Ben. Um, I wanna-- I was referred by one of your patients, uh, Henry. Uh, yeah, I just wanna give it a try. I'm just wondering how, how you charge. Um, I've got a Bupa. I'm with a Bupa insurance. Um...

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output (system__message_to_speak empty). FAIL if agent produces any spoken filler (e.g. 'Mm-hmm'), asks a clarifying question instead of routing, or fails to call any tool.
